vulnerability_info.Message:
If used as a MAC, the length of the key should be at least the same as the output length of the hash function, otherwise it will reduce the security of the MAC function
We Found: 0

RSA-512 and RSA-1024 is insecure, RSA-2048 is Acceptable but not recommended.
We Found: 2048
RFC 9155 - Deprecating SHA-1 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2.

Slicing_Criteria.SourceCode: transport.TLSClientConfig = &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true} // #nosec G402 -- InsecureSkipVerify is a configurable option we allow

Def_Use_Link.SourceCode: transport.TLSClientConfig = &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true} // #nosec G402 -- InsecureSkipVerify is a configurable option we allow
